mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND `show` = 1 AND state = 1
SELECT MAX(CAST(lable_code as SIGNED INTEGER)) lableCode FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE parent_code = 0

SELECT lable_code lableCode, lable_name lableName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, status status, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate, lable_id lableId, lable_details_id lableDetailsId, rebates, user_b_id userBId, reson reson, state state FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE parent_code = #{lableCode}
SELECT * FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} and parent_code = #{i}
SELECT * FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} and lable_id = #{lableId} and `show`= #{show}
SELECT user_b_id FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE lable_id = 9 AND tree_leaf = 0
SELECT rebates FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE lable_id = 9 AND tree_leaf = 1 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}
